data.title: Multi-Layer Security
data.description: Implementing defense-in-depth strategies to protect against varied threats.
data.technical_spec: Combines firewall, intrusion detection systems (IDS), and encryption.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular security assessments and vulnerability testing.
data.technical_spec: Quarterly penetration testing and continuous monitoring protocols.

data.title: TLS Encryption
data.description: All data exchanges are secured using advanced encryption methods.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 is used to encrypt data in transit, ensuring privacy and integrity.

data.title: Zero Trust Architecture
data.description: Adopts a zero-trust model to enhance security for remote access.
data.technical_spec: All access decisions consider verified identity and device health.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Deploys strategies to mitigate the impact of Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Uses a combination of edge services and rate limiting to handle large volumetric attacks.
